sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking the orange ring at (51,41). The cursor should now be at the orange ring position. I need to see if any colored squares moved.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
prev_seg = previous_frame.segmentation

# Get key object positions
def get_positions(seg):
    pos = {}
    for n in seg['nodes']:
        if n['pixels'] >= 10:
            b = n['boundary']
            r = (min(x[0] for x in b) + max(x[0] for x in b))//2
            c = (min(x[1] for x in b) + max(x[1] for x in b))//2
            key = (n['color'], n['pixels'])
            pos[key] = (r, c)
    return pos

curr = get_positions(seg)
prev = get_positions(prev_seg)

print("Current positions:")
for k, v in sorted(curr.items()):
    print(f"  {k}: {v}")
print("\nChanges:")
for k in set(list(curr.keys()) + list(prev.keys())):
    if k in prev and k in curr and prev[k] != curr[k]:
        print(f"  {k}: {prev[k]} -> {curr[k]}")
    elif k in prev and k not in curr:
        print(f"  {k}: {prev[k]} -> GONE")
    elif k not in prev:
        print(f"  {k}: NEW at {curr[k]}")

# Cursor is now at orange ring (51,41)
# Need to click a gray diamond to swap it to the ring
# Gray diamonds: (9,49), (21,8), (35,45) - one already at purple ring (20,57)
# Click nearest gray diamond to place it at orange ring
print("\nClicking gray diamond at (35,45) to swap with cursor at orange ring")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 45}])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"game_tier": {"action_semantics": {"MOUSE": "Click ring places cursor. Click gray diamond swaps with cursor. Placing gray diamond at ring advances colored squares."}, "object_taxonomy": {"orange_ring": "at (51,41)", "purple_ring": "at (20,57)", "gray_diamond": "12px, hash 9f1825e2", "purple_square": "20px", "orange_square": "20px", "cursor": "white 12px"}, "win_pattern": "Place gray diamonds at rings to advance colored squares to their destinations", "level_log": {"level_2": "64 actions, cursor at orange ring"}, "cross_level_notes": "Gray diamonds at rings advance colored squares"}, "level_tier": {"world_model": "Cursor at orange ring (51,41). Gray diamonds at (9,49), (20,57), (21,8), (35,45). Orange square at (16,38), purple square at (41,49).", "goal_model": "Place gray diamonds at rings to move colored squares to matching rings", "recent_findings": ["Placing gray diamond at purple ring moved orange square"], "open_questions": ["Does placing at orange ring move purple square?"], "current_plan": "Place gray diamond at orange ring, observe effect", "strategy_log": [], "failed_probes": []}}
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
